response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in C++ at scale, cloud compute infrastructure, and technical leadership in distributed systems — all core requirements. While they have broad full-stack experience and open-source contributions, their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of 8+ years of C++ or 5+ years building cloud-scale compute platforms as mandated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to own ambiguous projects and build developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of 8 years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No prior technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
